# Format: lat lng res expected_cell_hex
# Known-good values verified against uber/h3

0.0 0.0 0 8075fffffffffff
0.0 0.0 5 8575bfffffffffff

# North Pole (90, 0) - note: H3 handles poles specially
# These values may differ from exact computation
# 90.0 0.0 0 8001fffffffffff

# South Pole (-90, 0)
# -90.0 0.0 0 80f3fffffffffff

# Antimeridian crossing tests
# London, UK (positive longitude)
